title: Login page not loading
description: Users report a blank screen after entering credentials on the login page.

title: Payment gateway timeout
description: Checkout fails intermittently with a gateway timeout error during peak hours.

title: Email notifications delayed
description: Order confirmation emails are arriving 2–3 hours late for some customers.

title: Profile photo upload fails
description: Image uploads return an error when file size exceeds 2MB even though limit is 5MB.

title: Mobile menu overlap
description: Navigation menu overlaps the hero section on screens smaller than 768px.

title: Invoice PDF formatting issue
description: Downloaded invoices show misaligned columns and cut-off footer text.

title: Two-factor authentication reset
description: Customer locked out after phone change and needs 2FA reset assistance.

title: Search filters not saving
description: Saved filter presets disappear after logging out and back in.

title: Subscription renewal reminder
description: Customer did not receive renewal reminder email before plan expiration.

title: Dashboard analytics mismatch
description: Weekly report totals do not match exported CSV data for the same date range.

title: Dark mode contrast issue
description: Secondary button text is hard to read in dark mode on settings page.

title: API rate limit clarification
description: Developer needs documentation on current API rate limits for production keys.
